name: id
description: FPL element ID — unique integer per player across the season

name: web_name
description: Short display name as shown on the FPL website (e.g. "Salah")

name: position
description: Position: GKP, DEF, MID, or FWD (derived from element_type 1–4)

name: team
description: Team short name, e.g. "LIV", "ARS", "MCI"

name: price
description: Current price in £m (now_cost / 10)

name: selected_by_percent
description: Ownership as a percentage of all FPL managers

name: total_points
description: Season total FPL points

name: form
description: FPL rolling form score — average points over the last 4 gameweeks

name: bps
description: Bonus point system total for the season

name: bonus
description: Total bonus points earned this season (1–3 per game)

name: ict_index
description: ICT Index — composite of influence, creativity, and threat scores

name: minutes
description: Total minutes played this season

name: chance_of_playing_next_round
description: Probability of playing next GW (0–100). Null in the API means fully fit; filled to 100

name: goals_scored
description: Goals scored this season

name: assists
description: Assists this season

name: clean_sheets
description: Clean sheets this season

name: saves
description: Goalkeeper saves this season (3 saves = 1 FPL point)

name: goals_conceded
description: Goals conceded this season

name: own_goals
description: Own goals this season

name: penalties_saved
description: Penalties saved this season

name: penalties_missed
description: Penalties missed this season

name: yellow_cards
description: Yellow cards this season

name: red_cards
description: Red cards this season

name: expected_goals
description: Expected goals (xG) season total from the FPL data feed

name: expected_assists
description: Expected assists (xA) season total

name: expected_goal_involvements
description: Expected goal involvements (xGI = xG + xA) season total

name: expected_goals_per_90
description: xG per 90 minutes

name: expected_assists_per_90
description: xA per 90 minutes

name: expected_goal_involvements_per_90
description: xGI per 90 minutes

name: fdr
description: Fixture Difficulty Rating for next fixture (1=easiest, 5=hardest). Not in bootstrap-static; filled to 3 (neutral) until a fixture loader is wired (backlog).

name: transfers_in_event
description: Net transfers in this gameweek

name: transfers_out_event
description: Net transfers out this gameweek

name: defensive_contribution
description: Season defensive contribution points (2025-26 rule: awarded for high CBI/tackle counts)

name: defensive_contribution_per_90
description: Defensive contribution points per 90 minutes

name: clearances_blocks_interceptions
description: CBI total this season — clearances + blocks + interceptions

name: fd_goals
description: Goals scored this season per football-data.org (includes penalties). Sparse — 0 for non-scorers.

name: fd_assists
description: Assists this season per football-data.org. Sparse — 0 for players not appearing in /scorers.

name: fd_penalties
description: Penalty goals this season (subset of fd_goals). Sparse — 0 for non-scorers.

name: fd_played_matches
description: Matches appeared in per football-data.org /scorers. Sparse — 0 for non-scorers (not a full appearances count).

name: fd_goals_per_90
description: Goals per 90 minutes (fd_goals / fd_played_matches * 90). 0 when fd_played_matches = 0.

name: fd_assists_per_90
description: Assists per 90 minutes (fd_assists / fd_played_matches * 90). 0 when fd_played_matches = 0.

name: fd_goal_involvements
description: Total direct goal contributions (fd_goals + fd_assists). Sparse — 0 for non-scorers.

name: fd_penalty_share
description: Fraction of goals that came from penalties (fd_penalties / (fd_goals + 1)). High value = penalty-dependent scorer.

name: table_position
description: Current league table position (1 = top). Broadcast to all players on the team.

name: table_points
description: Cumulative league points this season. Broadcast to all players on the team.

name: goal_difference
description: Season goal difference (goals_for − goals_against). Can be negative. Broadcast.

name: goals_for
description: Team goals scored this season (total, not per-player). Broadcast.

name: goals_against
description: Team goals conceded this season (total). Broadcast.

name: wins
description: Season wins. Broadcast.

name: draws
description: Season draws. Broadcast.

name: losses
description: Season losses. Broadcast.

name: played_games
description: Matches played by the team this season (max 38). Broadcast.

name: prior_goals
description: Goals scored in previous season (SA or FL1) for cross-league transfers. 0 for players with no cross-league prior record.

name: prior_assists
description: Assists in previous season (SA or FL1) for cross-league transfers. 0 for no prior.

name: prior_played_matches
description: Matches appeared in prior season (SA/FL1). 0 for no prior.

name: prior_goals_per_90
description: Prior-season goals per 90 minutes (prior_goals / prior_played_matches * 90). 0 for no prior.

name: prior_assists_per_90
description: Prior-season assists per 90 minutes. 0 for no prior.
